$schema.purpose: Curated 301 alias map for paths that 404 today. Loaded by next.config.mjs (async redirects) and middleware. Operator additions via /admin/404-radar (Phase 2). Agent proposals via /api/404/agent (Phase 3) require operator approval before landing here.
$schema.format: All keys under `aliases` are <from-path>: <to-path> string pairs. Keep alphabetically sorted for stable diffs.
$schema.safetyRule: Never add an alias for a path that has a real page — it will make that page unreachable. Verify with `pnpm build` + a fresh dev start before committing.
